notes.text:
An update is available for module.galera, module.mariadb, mariadb, galera.
This update affects Rocky Linux 9.
A Common Vulnerability Scoring System (CVSS) base score, which gives a detailed severity rating, is available for each vulnerability from the CVE list
notes.title: Topic

notes.text:
MariaDB is a multi-user, multi-threaded SQL database server that is binary compatible with MySQL. 

Security Fix(es):

* mariadb: MariaDB Server: Arbitrary code execution via wsrep_notify_cmd (CVE-2026-49261)

Bug Fix(es) and Enhancement(s):

* [Rocky Linux9][tracker] Rebase Galera to 26.4.27 MariaDB:10.11 (JIRA:Rocky Linux-140363)

* Rebase MariaDB 10.11 to 10.11.18 in Rocky Linux9 (JIRA:Rocky Linux-183087)

For more details about the security issue(s), including the impact, a CVSS score, acknowledgments, and other related information, refer to the CVE page(s) listed in the References section.

This advisory is provided by Ctrl IQ, Inc for Rocky Linux systems. For more information about CIQ security practices, visit https://ciq.com/security.
notes.title: Description

If you distribute this content, or a modified version of it, you must provide attribution to the original copyright holder(s) and provide a link to the original.
notes.title: Terms of Use

references.summary: Red Hat CSAF document for RHSA-2026:33482

document.title: Important: mariadb:10.11 security, bug fix, and enhancement update
